Install
Evotec project site pilot

ChartForgeX

Create polished SVG, PNG, and static HTML visuals for .NET reports, dashboards, documentation, and generated websites without shipping a JavaScript chart runtime.

Browse examples View on GitHub
Hub summary stays on evotec.xyz Visual demos live here Outputs are generated from repo code
Generated gallery case Dashboard Chart Portfolio Dashboard chart portfolio preview
Matrix Heatmap preview Topology Topology preview
SVG Static markup first
PNG Alpha-friendly export
HTML Embeddable report output
.NET No runtime dependencies

Site shell and chart output are separate on purpose.

The dedicated site owns the Evotec-aligned chrome, navigation, search, docs, and browsing workflow. ChartForgeX owns the rendered examples, the source code that builds them, and the visual fidelity of each SVG, PNG, and HTML case.

Open reproducible cases

Pilot contract

Dedicated site, project-owned source

This site is the first dedicated project-site pilot for visual-heavy Evotec projects. The central Evotec hub keeps the project summary, while this subdomain owns the gallery, documentation, and rendered examples.

Source-linked demos

Every visual points back to code

Example cards should show the rendered output, the HTML/SVG/PNG artifacts, and the exact source file or method that produced the case so a developer can copy it and build from there.

Reusable pattern

Project flavor, shared foundation

Navigation, metadata, docs, sitemap, search, and quality gates follow PowerForge conventions. The visual identity belongs to ChartForgeX through the local theme and gallery pages.

Evotec

ChartForgeX is an Evotec open-source project. The hub page stays on evotec.xyz; this dedicated site hosts visual examples, docs, and reproducible cases.
